rules.Name: Holo Interference Field
rules.Text: At the end of this ship's activation, you may place a Holo Interference Field within 3" of this ship. These Holo Interference Fields are removed during the Cleanup step of the Roundup phase and are circular with a 4" diameter (a D6 or custom template are perfect tokens to represent these). Enemy Ships ignore the target's Spikes and Signature when attacking through a Holo Interference Field. Enemy Fighters & Bombers underneath the Holo Interference Field when it is placed, or that move/are placed into the Holo Interference Field are removed on a 4+.

rules.Name: Feature Carrier
rules.Text: At the start of the game, before players deploy, choose one Deployable Feature from the PHR Deployable Features List. This Ship starts the game carrying that Deployable Feature.
